steps.title: Find the median, mode, and mean
steps.content: Order the data: 80, 81, 81, 81, 82. The median (middle value of 5) is the 3rd value: 81°F. The mode (most frequent value) is 81°F, which appears 3 times compared to 80 and 82 each appearing once. The mean is (80 + 81 + 81 + 81 + 82) ÷ 5 = 405 ÷ 5 = 81°F.

steps.title: Calculate the range
steps.content: The range is the difference between the maximum and minimum values: 82 - 80 = 2°F. That matches choice D — D is correct.
